key_themes: Ongoing €50m share buyback program with frequent repurchases
Resilient FY2025 results with dividend growth
summary: Glanbia plc (GLB.L), a nutrition company with leading sports nutrition brands like Optimum Nutrition and Isopure, shows solidly positive sentiment. Management is aggressively returning capital via a €50 million buyback program (launched Feb 2026, with near-daily repurchases and cancellations announced in April), supporting the stock which is up over 70% in the past year, +19% YTD, and trading near its 52-week high around €17.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/GLB.L/)[[2]](https://www.tipranks.com/news/company-announcements/glanbia-continues-e50m-share-buyback-with-new-repurchase-on-euronext-dublin) FY2025 results were described as resilient with a 10% dividend increase. Investor discussion is quiet on X and forums with limited retail buzz, but news flow is consistently supportive of shareholder value.[[3]](https://www.marketbeat.com/stocks/LON/GLB/)
sources: 10+ buyback RNS announcements (Apr 2026), FY2025 results coverage (Feb 2026), Yahoo Finance, Morningstar, TipRanks, LSE pages, ~4-5 relevant X posts found (low volume), LSE/ADVFN share chat references
